title: Sten Stensson Stéen från Eslöv på nya äventyr
writer: Sölve Cederstrand, Torsten Lundqvist, Fritz Gustaf Sundelöf
actors: Elis Ellis, Karin Swanström, Brita Appelgren
plot: A traveling theatre company comes to one of the smallest hotels in the town of Lund. An actress accidentally gets a key to the room where Sten Stensson Stéen lives.
